faq.description: Everything you need to know about Auditora.ai.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions

howItWorks.question: How does URL analysis work?
howItWorks.answer: Paste your company website URL and our AI reads your public pages to understand your business context — industry, services, and operations. From that context, it identifies your most critical process, maps it in BPMN notation, and runs a risk analysis. No internal data access required.

dataAccess.question: What data do you access from my website?
dataAccess.answer: We only read publicly available pages on your website — the same content any visitor would see. We crawl up to 5 pages (homepage, about, services) and extract text content. No login credentials, no internal systems, no private data.

accuracy.question: How accurate is the AI analysis?
accuracy.answer: The instant analysis identifies industry-level risks and common process patterns. For deeper, company-specific insights, use the optional AI conversation to answer guided questions about your operations. The more context you provide, the more precise the risk findings become.

deepening.question: Can I deepen the analysis beyond the instant report?
deepening.answer: Yes. After the instant report, you can enter a guided AI conversation. The AI asks targeted questions about your operations — suppliers, inputs, outputs, customers — and builds a much richer process map with detailed risk analysis including failure modes for each activity.

deliverables.question: What deliverables do I receive?
deliverables.answer: You receive a BPMN 2.0 process map and a detailed risk report with severity scoring, mitigation recommendations, and opportunity identification. After signing up, you can export diagrams, edit them, and track risk mitigation over time.

dataSecurity.question: Is my data secure?
dataSecurity.answer: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Anonymous sessions expire after 24 hours if you don't create an account. We never use your data to train AI models. Once you sign up, your data is stored in your organization's private workspace.

bpmKnowledge.question: Do I need BPM or process mapping experience?
bpmKnowledge.answer: Not at all. Auditora.ai is designed for business owners and directors who have never mapped a process. The AI handles all the technical work — you just answer questions about how your business operates in plain language.

afterSignup.question: What happens after I create an account?
afterSignup.answer: Your process map and risk analysis are saved permanently. You can edit diagrams, map additional processes, run live AI-guided sessions with your team, track risk mitigation, and export professional deliverables.

hero.title: Discover hidden risks in your business
hero.subtitle: Paste your website URL. Our AI analyzes your business and delivers a complete process map with risk analysis — in under 60 seconds.
hero.subtext: Free. No signup required. Results in 60 seconds.

howItWorks.title: From URL to actionable insights in three steps

step1.title: Paste your URL
step1.description: Enter your company website. Our AI reads your public pages to understand your business — industry, services, and operations.

step2.title: AI maps your processes
step2.description: Automatic industry detection, critical process mapping in BPMN notation, and risk identification — all in under 60 seconds.

step3.title: Get your risk report
step3.description: Receive a visual process map and detailed risk analysis with severity scoring, bottlenecks, and improvement opportunities.

step4.title: Deepen and act
step4.description: Optionally answer AI-guided questions for deeper analysis. Sign up to save, edit, and track risk mitigation over time.

benefits.title: Process discovery that starts from your website
benefits.description: No data uploads. No meetings. No system logs. Just your public URL and 60 seconds.

benefit1.title: Zero Friction Discovery
benefit1.subtitle: No internal data required.
benefit1.description: Traditional process mining requires system logs, interviews, and weeks of preparation. Auditora.ai starts from your public website — the AI infers your critical processes from what's already visible.

benefit2.title: Instant Risk Analysis
benefit2.subtitle: Spot what you're missing.
benefit2.description: Every business has hidden operational risks — bottlenecks, compliance gaps, single points of failure. Our AI identifies them automatically and scores them by severity and probability.

benefit3.title: Professional Process Maps
benefit3.subtitle: BPMN diagrams you can actually use.
benefit3.description: Get industry-standard BPMN 2.0 process diagrams — not generic flowcharts. Export them, share them with your team, or import them into Camunda, Signavio, or any BPMN-compatible tool.
benefit3.point2: Export and share with your team

benefit4.title: AI-Guided Deep Analysis
benefit4.subtitle: Go deeper when you need to.
benefit4.description: The instant report is just the beginning. Answer guided questions and the AI builds a complete SIPOC analysis with failure modes for every activity — consulting-grade deliverables in minutes, not weeks.
benefit4.point2: FMEA analysis for every process step
benefit4.point3: From 5 general risks to 15+ specific findings
